evals.prompt: Fetch me the FASTA sequence for UniProt accession P12345 over the REST API.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-uniprot. Retrieves the entry directly from the UniProt REST endpoint https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/P12345.fasta and returns the amino acid sequence in FASTA format.

assertions.value: Hits the UniProt REST retrieve endpoint with the accession and .fasta format to return the sequence.

evals.prompt: Search UniProt for the reviewed (Swiss-Prot) human BRCA1 entry and give me its accession, gene name, and length as a TSV.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-uniprot. Builds a structured query (gene:BRCA1 AND organism_id:9606 AND reviewed:true), calls the search endpoint with selected fields=accession,gene_names,organism_name,length and format=tsv, returning the reviewed entry.

assertions.value: Uses field-specific UniProt query syntax with reviewed:true and a fields/format selection on the search endpoint.

evals.prompt: I have a list of Ensembl gene IDs and I need their corresponding UniProtKB accessions. Map them using UniProt's ID mapping service.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-uniprot. Runs the three-step ID mapping workflow against rest.uniprot.org/idmapping: submit the job (run), poll status, then fetch results, mapping the Ensembl IDs to UniProtKB accessions.

assertions.value: Uses the submit/poll-status/fetch-results idmapping workflow to convert between identifier types.

evals.prompt: Download all reviewed human kinase entries from UniProt — there are too many for normal pagination, so stream the whole result set as FASTA.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-uniprot. Uses the stream endpoint https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/stream with a query like 'kinase AND organism_id:9606 AND reviewed:true' and format=fasta to download the complete result set without pagination.

assertions.value: Uses the UniProt stream endpoint for large result sets instead of paginated search.

evals.prompt: For UniProt P04637, classify its protein family and give me the full InterPro domain architecture and the Pfam signatures.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-interpro. The user wants protein family/domain classification and member-database (Pfam) signatures, which is InterPro's territory, not raw UniProt entry retrieval, search, or ID mapping.

evals.prompt: Get me the AlphaFold predicted 3D structure (mmCIF) and pLDDT confidence scores for UniProt P04637.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-alphafold-db. The user wants the predicted 3D structure and confidence metrics keyed by the UniProt accession, not the UniProt sequence entry, search, or ID mapping.
